description: Scan models/ directory at startup to discover all available services as subcommands

verify.expect: shows list of available services or help text

notes: Session 2: print_service_help() shows 416 services in 3-column layout

description: Parse operation arguments dynamically from model input shape: each member becomes --kebab-case flag
notes: Session 2: get_operation_args_info() + ArgInfo struct, 7 tests including real STS/IAM models

description: E2E: raws iam get-user works (query protocol, global endpoint)

verify.expect: returns JSON with User info or ValidationError

notes: Session 2: Works with global endpoint (iam.amazonaws.com). Returns ValidationError for assumed-role creds (expected).

description: E2E: raws ec2 describe-regions works (ec2 protocol)
E2E: raws kms list-keys works (json protocol)
E2E: raws sns list-topics works (query protocol)
E2E: raws sqs list-queues works (json protocol)
notes: Session 2: Returns {} (empty, no queues). SQS uses json protocol.

description: E2E: raws cloudformation list-stacks works (query protocol)
E2E: raws route53 list-hosted-zones works (rest-xml protocol, global endpoint)
notes: Session 2: Works with global endpoint. Returns {HostedZones: [], IsTruncated: false, MaxItems: 100}

description: E2E: raws cloudtrail lookup-events works (json protocol)
notes: CloudWatch uses smithy-rpc-v2-cbor (unsupported), replaced with CloudTrail (json protocol)

description: E2E: raws ecs list-clusters works (json protocol)
E2E: raws rds describe-db-instances works (query protocol)
